channel.title: GitHub PHP Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: snipe/snipe-it
item.description: A free open source IT asset/license management system

item.title: symfony/symfony
item.description: The Symfony PHP framework

item.title: nextcloud/all-in-one
item.description: 📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

item.title: barryvdh/laravel-debugbar
item.description: Debugbar for Laravel (Integrates PHP Debug Bar)

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: composer/composer
item.description: Dependency Manager for PHP

item.title: librenms/librenms
item.description: Community-based GPL-licensed network monitoring system

item.title: alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
item.description: Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted application that monitors the performance and uptime of your internet connection.

item.title: Sylius/Sylius
item.description: Open Source eCommerce Framework on Symfony

item.title: laravel/laravel
item.description: Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax. We’ve already laid the foundation for your next big idea — freeing you to create without sweating the small things.

item.title: twigphp/Twig
item.description: Twig, the flexible, fast, and secure template language for PHP

item.title: fzaninotto/Faker
item.description: Faker is a PHP library that generates fake data for you

item.title: Seldaek/monolog
item.description: Sends your logs to files, sockets, inboxes, databases and various web services

item.title: cweagans/composer-patches
item.description: Simple patches plugin for Composer

item.title: JhumanJ/OpnForm
item.description: Beautiful Open-Source Form Builder

item.title: livewire/livewire
item.description: A full-stack framework for Laravel that takes the pain out of building dynamic UIs.

item.title: woocommerce/woocommerce
item.description: A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.

item.title: nextcloud/richdocuments
item.description: 📑 Collabora Online for Nextcloud

item.title: dompdf/dompdf
item.description: HTML to PDF converter for PHP

item.title: stripe/stripe-php
item.description: PHP library for the Stripe API.

item.title: openai-php/laravel
item.description: ⚡️ OpenAI PHP for Laravel is a supercharged PHP API client that allows you to interact with OpenAI API
